optional_reference_scope_caution: all_models is a broader exploratory reference set, not necessarily a stronger benchmark.
non_detection_wording: These profiles are corpus-derived AI-style comparison benchmarks. They are not AI detectors, not authorship classifiers, not plagiarism tools, and not universal averages of AI writing.

profiles.provenance: Curated from the tuned pre-export profile preview after manual policy decisions. This preview changes public display policy and swaps all_models sentence_length_sd default display to the simpler partial-pooling intercept fit; it does not fit new models or export final app JSON.
profiles.global_caution: A document being close to this profile does not show that it was written by AI. A fully AI-generated document will not necessarily be close to this profile. Outputs vary by model, prompt, task, genre, editing and length. These profiles are corpus-derived AI-style comparison benchmarks. They are not AI detectors, not authorship classifiers, not plagiarism tools, and not universal averages of AI writing.
